title: Goiler Weaponry
description: Unique Weapons for an exciting Minecraft Experience
body:
![head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8e25f6cf4e8da62efd35e6425fc0134d074c269.png) **Behold! This mod will grant you with a great combat experience.**


![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b50f907c65dc9734f4bde87f5fb3b250e9097c03.png)
This mod primarily adds a new set of tools, the hammer,
as well as several other new tools and weapons:

![iron hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f27c7116697f784302b58d82c8f83df70c80e8f_0.webp)        ![diamond hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25f049a3bb02689ae8b816adfaa2838b5c369798_0.webp)
The Hammer ![fighttt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e90ead15d376caaab710af7953b558d76aab440.jpeg) The hammer is a strong kind of weapon
and can also be used as a tool for digging.
Made with vanilla metalls and rabbit hide,
they make more damage than a sword.
It's possible to use it like a pickaxe, however
it is not the quickest digging tool.

The Lifter The four use item can teleport in the
radius of 3 blocks all players to the user.
Combined in the smithing table with a golden
hammer will create a combination of,
both it has the lifter feature but with
similar durability of gold tools.

Instruments ♪♪ ![uke :D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2887ddf52abc7c7eda73684abc91c36350fcc74b_0.webp) Those instruments are not to be enjoyed,
but to get rid of everything that can hear.
The Ukulele plays random melodies to scare animals away,
the Carrot Flute blows everything out of your sight.

The Dagger ![dagger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae6bb62ea7fb01b2e94286740f9698f2aa9d0010.jpeg) Because of its short cooldown, this weapon is perfect for spammers

Arrow Weapons A new bow - the coral bow - is the underwater variant of the
normal bow, found in ocean ruins and shoots coral arrows.
The Blowpipe is an instant weapon that shoots arrows
immediately, but with a much lower accuracy and range.



Please post your ideas and issues on:
[![Github](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/855d4f4b8194c9f8b6f327365800c81d9ca36bdb.png)](https://github.com/nudelauflauch/goilerweapony/issues)
